category_sources: Official GitHub README says Frizbee provides checksums for GitHub Actions and container images based on tags.
source_facts.description says Throw a tag at and it comes back with a checksum.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title and README use Frizbee.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, CLI usage, library usage, and configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/stacklok/frizbee, so repo is not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes generating checksums for GitHub Actions and container images.
